title: Diagonal Traverse
description: Trả các phần tử matrix theo thứ tự diagonal traverse (↗ rồi ↙ xen kẽ).
approach: Simulate direction: start (0,0); if top row or even diagonal go down-left else up-right.
memoryTip: Toggle dir when hit top row or right column — diagonal walk.

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def findDiagonalOrder(self, mat: List[List[int]]) -> List[int]:
        if not mat: return []
        m, n = len(mat), len(mat[0])
        ans = []
        r = c = 0
        for _ in range(m*n):
            ans.append(mat[r][c])
            if (r+c) % 2 == 0:
                if c == n-1: r += 1
                elif r == 0: c += 1
                else: r -= 1; c += 1
            else:
                if r == m-1: c += 1
                elif c == 0: r += 1
                else: r += 1; c -= 1
        return ans

analysis.correctness: Direction rules cover boundary turns for zigzag diagonals.
